programme.title: Violent Night
programme.desc: A gang of violent home-invaders find out the hard way that you REALLY don't want to be on Santa's naughty list, in Tommy Wirkola's dark, violent Christmas comedy. With David Harbour.

programme.title: The Great Wall
programme.desc: Fantasy adventure starring Matt Damon and Willem Dafoe. In 11th-century China, Europeans seeking the secret of gunpowder are caught up in a war against alien monsters.

programme.title: Mister Lonely
programme.desc: Surreal drama. Troubled Michael Jackson and Marilyn Monroe imitators (Diego Luna and Samantha Morton) find love on a Scottish island. In English and French/subs. Strong language/sex.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: 3:10 to Yuma
programme.desc: Classic western with Glenn Ford and Van Heflin. The capture of a murderous stagecoach robber propels an impoverished local rancher on a perilous journey. Directed by Delmer Daves.

programme.title: The Tall Men
programme.desc: Western. Clark Gable plays a Civil War veteran who, with his brother (Cameron Mitchell), accepts the role of trail boss on a huge cattle drive for a crooked cattleman (Robert Ryan).

programme.title: They Rode West
programme.desc: Tough western. A cavalry doctor (Robert Francis) discovers a Native American tribe is dying of malaria, but his by-the-book captain (Phil Carey) refuses to allow their treatment.

programme.title: The Desert Fox
programme.desc: Drama. James Mason stars in Henry Hathaway's sympathetic portrait of Field Marshal Erwin Rommel in the final years of his life during the Second World War. With Jessica Tandy.

programme.title: Deep Impact
programme.desc: Elijah Wood and Morgan Freeman star in the sci-fi disaster movie about impending meteorite-related disaster, attempts to destroy it, and possibly some cataclysmic havoc.

programme.title: Jennifer's Body
programme.desc: Gory horror starring Megan Fox and Amanda Seyfried. A macabre ritual literally turns a cheerleader into a man-eater. Can her nerdy friend save the day.

programme.title: Dead Man's Shoes
programme.desc: Shane Meadows' thriller starring Paddy Considine, Gary Stretch and Toby Kebbell. An ex-soldier is bent on revenge against the drug dealers who cruelly tormented his younger brother.

programme.title: Let Him Go
programme.desc: Neo-western with Kevin Costner. After losing their only son, a retired sheriff and his wife try to save their former daughter-in-law from her abusive partner.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Jubal
programme.desc: Western with Glenn Ford, Ernest Borgnine, Rod Steiger and Valerie French. A cowboy is given a job by a rancher, sparking lethal jealousy in a colleague and desire in the boss's wife.

programme.title: Anzio
programme.desc: Epic Second World War drama starring Robert Mitchum. A reporter gets trapped behind enemy lines during the costly 1944 Allied invasion of Italy. With Peter Falk and Robert Ryan.

programme.title: Broken Arrow
programme.desc: Western starring James Stewart. A gold prospector, tired of reprisal killings between whites and Native Americans, offers a truce to the Apaches' leader. But tensions resurface.

programme.title: The Son of Robin Hood
programme.desc: Swashbuckling adventure starring June Laverick. Robin Hood is dead and his band of followers seek a worthy new leader. And they get one who exceeds all their expectations.

programme.title: The Eagle
programme.desc: Historical adventure with Channing Tatum and Jamie Bell. A Roman commander and his British slave embark on a risky mission to recover a military mascot lost in Scotland.
